title: selliguea taeniata var. palmata
intro: Selliguea taeniata var. palmata, also known as palmate shield fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea taeniata var. palmata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
